scope: SS Piping Network. Location: Badr City (Future Pro facility). Year of implementation: 2023.
intro: Cons Korra partnered with MIDEX to upgrade the stainless-steel process piping serving its pharmaceutical manufacturing operations at the Future Pro facility in Badr City.
challenge: The Future Pro facility needed a hygienic, corrosion-resistant piping network capable of meeting pharmaceutical-grade process requirements, with minimal disruption to ongoing production.
approach: MIDEX's engineering team surveyed the existing utilities, designed the stainless-steel routing to GMP hygienic-piping standards, and carried out orbital welding, pressure testing and passivation on site.
highlights: Detailed piping isometrics and layout drawings
passivation and documentation package for QA sign-off
outcome: A validated, GMP-compliant stainless-steel piping network was commissioned on schedule, giving Cons Korra a reliable process utility backbone at Future Pro.

scope: RO Water Station Modifications. Location: Badr City. Year of implementation: 2023.
intro: MTBI engaged MIDEX to modify and upgrade the Reverse Osmosis (RO) water station at its MTBI facility in Badr City.
challenge: The existing RO water station needed process and capacity modifications to keep pace with production demand while maintaining pharmaceutical water-quality standards.
approach: MIDEX assessed the RO skid and distribution loop, engineered the required modifications, and executed the upgrade with minimal downtime to the water system.
highlights: RO system assessment and modification design
outcome: The upgraded RO water station now delivers consistent, specification-compliant purified water output to support MTBI's ongoing production at the site.
